title: Goldman Says Brent Could Top $120 If Hormuz Disruptions Persist
title_cn: 高盛表示，如果霍尔木兹海峡中断持续，布伦特原油价格可能突破 120 美元
summary: Brent could rally to more than $120 a barrel by the fourth quarter if disruptions of the Strait of Hormuz persist, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc., although that’s not the bank’s base case.

title: Stocks Extend Rally as Chips Rebound, Oil Declines: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着筹码反弹、油价下跌，股市延续涨势：市场收尾
summary: Asian stocks rose for the first time in four days as investors returned to chipmakers, driving a rebound in the sector after the recent selloff. Oil declined.

title: Japan Insurers Buy Most Super-Long Bonds in Three Years in June
title_cn: 日本保险公司六月份购买了三年来最多的超长期债券
summary: Japanese insurance firms bought the most super-long government bonds in three years last month, adding to signs that demand from a key buyer is stabilizing.

title: Iron Ore Drops as China Steel Losses Deepen, Hormuz Risks Rise
title_cn: 铁矿石下跌，中钢亏损加深，霍尔木兹风险上升
summary: Iron ore fell for a second day as deteriorating profit margins at Chinese steel mills and continued US-Iran hostilities clouded the demand outlook.

title: China Broadens Market Rescue With Tech Stocks Drawing Support
title_cn: 中国扩大市场救援，科技股获得支持
summary: China is stepping up efforts to stabilize its stock market, mobilizing a range of state-linked institutions to stem a tech-driven selloff. The chip-heavy STAR 50 index extended gains.

title: Gold Rises on Dip-Buying as Traders Weigh Middle East Clashes
title_cn: 交易员权衡中东冲突，黄金因逢低买盘而上涨
summary: Gold rose on dip-buying as traders monitored developments in the Middle East for clues on the energy price impact on inflation.

title: Global Investors Turn Cautious on Indian Bonds
title_cn: 全球投资者对印度债券持谨慎态度
summary: The rupee is also under strain, with slowing debt inflows coinciding with renewed foreign selling in stocks.

title: SBI Funds Poised for Strong India Debut After $1 Billion IPO
title_cn: SBI 基金在 10 亿美元 IPO 后将在印度强势亮相
summary: SBI Funds Management Ltd. is poised for a strong trading debut Tuesday after investors piled into its $1 billion initial public offering, making it one of India’s most heavily subscribed billion-dollar share sales.

title: Moody’s Flags Rising Risks in Indonesia on Policy Uncertainty
title_cn: 穆迪指出印度尼西亚因政策不确定性而面临的风险上升
summary: Moody’s Ratings remains concerned about policy uncertainty and fiscal sustainability risks in Indonesia, reinforcing its cautious outlook and warning that downside risks are likely to persist.

title: Korean Stock Traders Slash Margin Loans to Lowest Since April
title_cn: 韩国股票交易商将保证金贷款削减至四月份以来的最低水平
summary: South Korean investors slashed their leveraged stock positions to the lowest level in three months, as memory-chip losses halted the market’s rally.

title: Global Stocks Lift Australian Pension Funds to 9.5% Annual Gain
title_cn: 全球股市推动澳大利亚养老基金年涨幅达到 9.5%
summary: A rally in global equities delivered another strong year for Australia’s A$4.4 trillion ($3.1 trillion) pension fund industry, despite lingering concerns over the Middle East conflict and stubborn inflation.

title: Australia’s Stock Market Emerges as Haven From Volatile AI Trade
title_cn: 澳大利亚股市成为波动的人工智能贸易的避风港
summary: Australia’s stock market has emerged as an unlikely haven from the artificial intelligence-driven volatility that has roiled Asian equities in recent months.

title: New Zealand’s Faster Inflation Bolsters Case for More Rate Hikes
title_cn: 新西兰更快的通胀支持了进一步加息的理由
summary: New Zealand’s annual inflation accelerated to the fastest pace in more than two years, fanned by soaring fuel prices and bolstering the case for the Reserve Bank to execute back-to-back interest-rate increases.

title: Kioxia Bulls Ride Out Volatility With Targets 130% Above Market
title_cn: Kioxia 多头安然度过波动，目标高出市场 130%
summary: Analysts are maintaining bullish views on Kioxia Holdings Inc. despite a deepening share price correction, saying the stock is likely to resume its upward trajectory once supply-demand conditions improve.

title: LA’s $1.2 Billion ‘Graffiti Towers’ Cleared to Exit Bankruptcy
title_cn: 洛杉矶耗资12亿美元的“涂鸦塔”获准退出破产
summary: The bankrupt $1.2 billion Oceanwide Plaza project in Los Angeles, dubbed the Graffiti Towers after taggers spray-painted the abandoned complex, has been cleared for sale and possible completion more than seven years after the original Chinese developer ran out of money.

title: Gilts Rattled on Andy Burnham’s First Day as Fiscal Fears Return
title_cn: 随着财政担忧卷土重来，安迪·伯纳姆 (Andy Burnham) 上任第一天，英国国债就出现了动荡
summary: UK government bonds dropped after new Prime Minister Andy Burnham unnerved investors on his first day in the job over his approach to the country’s finances.

title: Netflix Taps US High-Grade Bond Market With $1 Billion Debt Sale
title_cn: Netflix 进军美国高等级债券市场 出售 10 亿美元债券
summary: Netflix Inc. raised $1 billion from a US high-grade bond sale on Monday, its first since a debut deal two years ago, as slowing sales growth fuels investor scrutiny of the company’s future.

title: Latin America Outperforms as Emerging Market Currencies Gain
title_cn: 随着新兴市场货币上涨，拉丁美洲表现优于大市
summary: Emerging-market currencies gained to start the week, with Latin American names getting a boost from a drop in volatility which further boosts their carry appeal.

title: Won Daily Trading Volume Jumps on Extended Hours, Stock Selloff
title_cn: 韩元每日交易量因延长交易时间而猛增，股票抛售
summary: Daily trading volume in the South Korean won has picked up since 24-hour trading began two weeks ago, a trend driven by foreigners offloading local chipmakers’ shares.

title: Samsung Hires Ex-Boston Dynamics Exec in Robotics Push
title_cn: 三星聘请前波士顿动力公司高管推动机器人技术发展
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. has hired one of South Korea’s leading robotics executives from Hyundai Motor Group to oversee a new robotics division, escalating competition in a sector emerging as the next battleground among global technology companies.

title: UBS Trading Desk Says Buy Momentum Stocks as Selloff Nears End
title_cn: 瑞银交易部门表示，随着抛售接近尾声，买入动量股
summary: The sharp selloff in momentum stocks may be nearing its end, creating an opportunity for investors to start rebuilding positions in artificial intelligence and semiconductor shares, according to UBS’ trading desk.

title: China AI Sensation Moonshot’s Gamble on Big Models Pays Off
title_cn: 中国AI Sensation Moonshot对大模型的赌博获得了回报
summary: Crowds rushed to an obscure corner of China’s premier tech summit, moving past monumental booths from Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. and Tencent Holdings Ltd. to catch a glimpse of the hottest name in domestic AI.

title_cn: 数据中心运营商赢得新合同后 NEXTDC 股价上涨
summary: NEXTDC Ltd. shares advanced after the Brisbane-based data-center operator said it had won new customer contracts, bolstering its contracted utilization by 11% in the three months to June.

summary: Jijia Vision is in discussions to hold an initial public offering on Hong Kong’s stock exchange as soon as this year, joining a flurry of Chinese AI firms planning public market debuts.

title: South Korea’s Early Exports Jump to July Record on AI-Led Gains
title_cn: 人工智能带动的增长，韩国 7 月份早期出口跃升至历史新高
summary: South Korea’s exports extended robust growth in early July as artificial intelligence-driven demand for semiconductors continued to fuel the economy.

title_cn: 伯纳姆选择纳拉扬为第一位出席内阁的英国人工智能部长

title: Oracle Credit Risk Hits Near 18-Year High on AI Debt Load Angst
title_cn: 由于人工智能债务负担焦虑，甲骨文信用风险触及近 18 年来的高点

title: BlackRock’s Meta Deal to Show the Power of $25 Billion M&A Spree
title_cn: 贝莱德的 Meta 交易展现了 250 亿美元并购热潮的力量
summary: For Larry Fink, BlackRock Inc.’s more than $12 billion debt sale for a Meta Platforms Inc. data center is the result of years spent transforming a public investments giant into a heavy hitter in private markets too.

title: Snap Nears Settlement of Addiction Case Ahead of Jury Trial
title_cn: Snap 成瘾案即将在陪审团审判前达成和解
summary: Snap Inc. said it has reached a tentative agreement to settle the second case set for trial over claims that the world’s largest social media platforms are addictive to minors, leaving only Meta Platforms Inc. to face a jury starting next week in Los Angeles.

title: Paytm’s Profit Rises After Turnaround Boosts Bottom Line
title_cn: Paytm 扭亏为盈后利润上升
summary: Paytm reported a 79% rise in net profit, reflecting cost cuts as well as growth across its payments and financial services businesses.

title: Andreessen Horowtiz Hires Army Vet to American Dynamism Team

title: Alibaba Fined Record €550 Million by EU for Illegal Sales

summary: Shares of Google owner Alphabet Inc. gained on a report that the company is developing a server chip designed to optimize its Gemini artificial intelligence model.

summary: Z.AI has completed construction of a giant data center that houses only Chinese-made chips, a big step in Beijing’s efforts to replace restricted Nvidia Corp. silicon for future AI development.

summary: Singles are outsourcing chats to ChatGPT and Claude, complicating how romantic connections begin

title: Influencers Are Being Paid to Spread the Mormon Church's Gospel
title_cn: 有影响力的人接受报酬来传播摩门教的福音
summary: Through its for-profit subsidiary, the church owns several advertising companies with influencer-marketing arms

title: Asia Is Seeing More Destabilizing Actions, Australia FM Penny Wong Says
title_cn: 澳大利亚外长黄英贤表示，亚洲正在发生更多破坏稳定的行动
summary: The Asia-Pacific region is seeing more destabilizing actions, according to Australia’s foreign minister, who cited China’s recent missile test and its military buildup as issues where nations want reassurance from Beijing.

title: Hegseth Faces Lawmakers Over Iran War Costs as Conflict Widens
title_cn: 随着冲突扩大，赫格斯面临立法者关于伊朗战争成本的问题
summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is set to testify before lawmakers for the first time in more than two months to defend the Trump administration’s request for billions of dollars in additional money for the Iran war and address growing public skepticism about the course of the conflict.

title: Israel Election 2026: Can Netanyahu Stay in Power? Who Could Succeed Him?
title_cn: 2026 年以色列大选：内塔尼亚胡能否继续掌权？谁能接替他？
summary: Israel is gearing up for a fall election that will effectively be a referendum on Benjamin Netanyahu, 76, the country’s longest-serving prime minister.

title: Takaichi’s Popularity Dips After Prioritizing Controversial Laws
title_cn: 在优先考虑有争议的法律后，高市的受欢迎程度下降
summary: Approval ratings for Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi dropped in the latest polls as she pushed ahead with some divisive bills despite voters’ concerns about the cost of living.

title: US Strikes More Iranian Targets as Houthis Threaten Blockade
title_cn: 胡塞武装威胁封锁，美国打击更多伊朗目标
summary: US forces struck Iranian targets after President Donald Trump vowed Tehran “will pay” for killing three US soldiers, even as mediators proposed a new truce with the Middle East war widening further.

title: Israeli Embassy Blasts Australian Ruling Party’s Conflict Stance
title_cn: 以色列大使馆谴责澳大利亚执政党的冲突立场
summary: Israel has publicly intervened in Australia’s domestic political debate, with its embassy criticizing as one-sided the ruling Labor party’s draft program on the conflict between Israel and the Palestinians.

title: Trump Speaks to UK’s Burnham, Gets Invite to Visit Manchester
title_cn: 特朗普与英国伯纳姆交谈并受邀访问曼彻斯特
summary: US President Donald Trump said he had a “very good conversation” with new UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham and that they would be meeting in the “not too distant future,” signaling potentially better ties after tensions with Burnham’s predecessor.

title: US Vows Fresh 50% Tariff on Canada as New Trade War Looms
title_cn: 随着新贸易战的临近，美国誓言对加拿大征收新的 50% 关税
summary: The Trump administration vowed to impose a fresh 50% tariff on some Canadian goods over what it said was unfair treatment of American alcohol, cars and dairy, further inflaming trade tensions between the two neighbors.

title: Philippines Says China Coast Guard Injured Sailor With Baton
title_cn: 菲律宾称中国海警用警棍打伤船员
summary: The Philippines accused China Coast Guard personnel of aggressively striking and wounding a Navy serviceman with a wooden baton in the South China Sea, escalating tensions before a meeting between the nations’ top diplomats this week.

title: DOJ Probes Harvard Financial Aid, Alleging China Donor Influence
title_cn: 美国司法部调查哈佛财政援助，指控中国捐助者的影响
summary: The US Justice Department said Monday it had launched a new investigation into Harvard University, alleging that some of its financial aid programs violate civil rights law by excluding American citizens.

title: Andy Burnham Names John Healey Chancellor in Surprise UK Cabinet Move
title_cn: 安迪·伯纳姆 (Andy Burnham) 任命约翰·希利 (John Healey) 为财政大臣，英国内阁变动令人惊讶
summary: Andy Burnham named former Defense Secretary John Healey to be his Chancellor of the Exchequer in a surprise move by the UK’s new prime minister that fueled speculation about a bigger increase in military spending.

title: Healey, Haigh, Mahmood: Who’s Who in Burnham’s New UK Cabinet
title_cn: 希利、黑格、马哈茂德：伯纳姆新英国内阁的名人录
summary: Delivering his first speech as UK prime minister in front of the famous black door of 10 Downing Street, Andy Burnham promised to bring forward “the biggest changes in the last 40 years” for Britain. Those changes started with his cabinet.

title: Saudi-Led Coalition in Yemen Vows to Protect Ships From Houthis
title_cn: 沙特领导的也门联军誓言保护船只免受胡塞武装袭击
summary: The Houthis, an Iran-backed Yemeni group, vowed to impose a maritime blockade on Saudi Arabia, prompting the military coalition in Yemen that’s led by the kingdom to say it had taken steps to protect vessels sailing the Red Sea.

title: Ukraine Company Fields New Long-Range Weapon Aimed at Russia
title_cn: 乌克兰公司部署针对俄罗斯的新型远程武器
summary: SkyFall, the Ukrainian defense technology company, has developed a long-range strike weapon that is being tested in operations against Russia, as Kyiv steps up a campaign that has caused severe logistical problems for Moscow.

title: Victims of Past Terrorism Urge US Not to Release Iranian Funds
title_cn: 过去恐怖主义的受害者敦促美国不要释放伊朗资金
summary: Groups representing victims of Iranian-linked terrorism urged the US not to release any money to Tehran, underscoring the political risks for President Donald Trump of fulfilling a key demand under a possible peace deal.

title: US Offers to Halve Aluminum Duties for Firms Building in US
title_cn: 美国提议将在美建设企业的铝关税减半
summary: The Trump administration announced an incentive program under which companies that build, expand or refurbish aluminum plants in the US would receive a tariff discount for the metal they ship into the country from abroad.

title: Burnham’s Pricey Pledges Leave Open Question of How to Fund Them
title_cn: 伯纳姆的昂贵承诺留下了如何为其提供资金的悬而未决的问题
summary: Addressing the nation as its new prime minister on Monday, Andy Burnham pledged his first action would be to secure people “breathing space” with the cost of living.

title: How Houthis’ Red Sea Threat Risks Bigger Oil Shock
title_cn: 胡塞武装的红海威胁如何引发更大的石油危机
summary: One thing that’s helped limit the Iran war’s disruption to global oil supply is the ability of Saudi Arabia to use an alternative export route to the Strait of Hormuz: the Red Sea.

title: Trump Says Netanyahu Won’t Be Arrested After Mamdani Threat
title_cn: 特朗普称内塔尼亚胡不会在马姆达尼威胁后被捕
summary: President Donald Trump said Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu “will not be arrested” in the US, rebuffing New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani’s suggestion that such an apprehension could happen.

title: Maine Power Play Sets Stage for Competitive Senate Ballot
title_cn: 缅因州权力游戏为竞争性参议院投票奠定了基础
summary: Democrats are picking their candidate to face the Republican incumbent in a far more orderly fashion than many had anticipated.
